basics.name: Sergio Rodolfo Cruz Gomez
basics.label: Professor of Computer Science
basics.summary: Professor of Computer Science at the Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México (UNAM), working on Deep Learning and Computer Vision / Object Detection.

work.name: Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México (UNAM)
work.summary: Teaching Artificial Intelligence, Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning, and Introduction to Computer Science at the Facultad de Ciencias.

work.name: Hong Kong Applied Science and Technology Research Institute (ASTRI)
work.summary: Improved character recognition accuracy by implementing a Deep Learning model for English and Chinese OCR, resulting in greater efficiency and customer satisfaction.
highlights: Printed character detection with PyTorch and YOLO. Increased character detection accuracy by 15% through this implementation.
Printed character segmentation with PyTorch and YOLO. Reduced image segmentation time by 20%. Improved quality control and reduced training time.
Designed and filed a patent for generating personalized data by combining Generative AI and Natural Language Processing (NLP) technologies.
Thesis: Hand Disambiguation in the Egocentric Perspective
Thesis: Gait Analysis of the Inferior Articulations of Healthy People and with Locomotion Problems
Exchange program at Bishop's University, Sherbrooke, Canada (2010-2011)

publications.publisher: International Conference on Digital Image Processing (ICDIP)

publications.name: Is that my hand? An egocentric dataset for hand disambiguation
Hand Detection Using Zoomed Neural Networks
publications.publisher: International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP)
